checks.expected: Best for: B2B SaaS requiring enterprise SSO for customers; Applications with complex authorization requirements; Companies needing compliance certifications for identity; Teams wanting customizable auth flows without building from scratch

Should NOT be recommended for: Simple consumer apps needing just email/password (use Supabase Auth or Firebase Auth); Workforce identity management (use Okta Workforce); Teams wanting to self-host everything (use Keycloak)
